zh.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Oyley是William d'Oyley和Isabella Moore的女兒，於1420年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾哈布萊登。她於大約1430年與Sir Richard Knollys在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1449年在她的家鄉享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Oyley是William d'Oyley和Isabella Moore的女儿，于1420年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾哈布萊登。她于大约1430年与Sir Richard Knollys在英国賀福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1449年在她的家乡享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Oyley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Olley with fused Old French preposition d' ‘from’.

variants.name: Olley
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of   Oley   2, a habitational name of Norman origin, from any of the five places called Ouilly in Calvados, France.

variants.name: Dilley
meanings: English: possibly a pet form of an unrecorded Old English personal name Dylla, found as the first element in the placenames Dillington (in the former Huntingdonshire) and Dilton (in Wiltshire). The name may sometimes have been confused with Doyley and Dolley (see Olley ).
German: variant of   Dilly   or a surname of French origin, an altered form of   Delay  .
In some cases also an altered form of French   Dilly  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Oyley was born in 1420, in Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, England as the daughter of William d'Oyley and Isabella Moore. She married Sir Richard Knollys about 1430, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1449, in her hometown, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Oyley est née en 1420, à Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, fille de William d'Oyley et Isabella Moore. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Knollys environ 1430, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1449, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Oyley wurde 1420 in Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, England, als Tochter von William d'Oyley und Isabella Moore geboren. Sie hat um 1430 in Herefordshire, England Sir Richard Knollys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1449 im Alter von 29 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Sir Richard Knollys circa 1430, nel Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1449, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Oyleyは1420年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンブレデンでWilliam d'OyleyとIsabella Mooreの娘として生まれた。約1430年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでSir Richard Knollysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1449年に故郷で29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Oyley(은)는 1420년 영국 벅잉함실르 햄블레든에서 William d'Oyley(와)과 Isabella Moore의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1430년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Sir Richard Knollys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1449년 그녀의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Oyley nasceu em 1420, em Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra filha de William d'Oyley e Isabella Moore. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Knollys aproximadamente 1430, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1449, em sua cidade natal, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Oyley родилась в 1420 г. в местности хамбледен, буккингхамшир, Англия. Её родителей звали William d'Oyley и Isabella Moore. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Knollys около 1430 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1449 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 29 лет.
